documentation_impact.rationale: The migration-write task renamed flat work task directories into day-scoped paths, renamed inbox artifacts, and rewrote cross-references across memory, work, inbox, tests, tools, personas, skills, pipelines, and .cursor surfaces. The feature index and run log record the migration-write stage per librarian and supervisor obligations.
changed_surfaces: src/inbox/in/*.md (timestamp-prefixed basenames; excluded ratification sources unchanged)

deferred_items.rationale: Post-write dry-run still plans 17 inbox-file renames because migrateTargetForInboxPath uses the full filename stem as semantic text; a follow-up SHALL make dry-run idempotent or normalize stems without stacking sid_hm tokens.

Stock applyReferenceUpdatesFromManifest runs after renames and fails on legacy paths; a follow-up SHALL reorder or remap paths in src/internal/tools/migrate-timestamp-naming.mjs without operator recovery scripts.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: The task staged diffs locally, avoided git commit and git push, recorded bootstrap-only metadata on the run-log event, and satisfied documentation-impact and policy-compliance obligations for governed changes.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: The artifact preserves traceable migration decisions, cites handbook and ADR sources, and lists deferred follow-ups for idempotency and tooling ordering.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: The task advanced the timestamp naming delivery slice, refreshed references for replay, and kept verification gates runnable after correcting a migration test assertion.
